title: Open Knowledge Format
summary: OKF is an open bundle format for portable, agent-ready knowledge.
markdown:
# Open Knowledge Format

OKF (Open Knowledge Format) is a bundle format for portable knowledge published by Google in June 2026. The specification is currently a draft at version 0.1 and is not yet production-ready. See also [[knowledge-catalog]].

claims.subject: open-knowledge-format
claims.quote: The specification is published as draft v0.1.

claims.subject: open-knowledge-format
claims.quote: Google released the Open Knowledge Format
